visual_description: The scene takes place in a dimly lit office with blinds covering the windows. A man in a dark suit hands a paper to a man in a light blue shirt, while other men in shirts and jackets stand nearby, some with arms crossed. The suited man then looks forward with a serious expression as another man in a light blue shirt examines a document.
